title: Analytics - Support Device Opened
scenario: Support Device Opened event is logged when the Support > Device screen is opened, with event counts updating after a few hours and Firebase dashboard displaying default analytics elements.
steps: Check Firebase dashboard for the 'Support Device Opened' event
Verify that default elements are displayed: graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment
expected: 'Support Device Opened' event is logged in Firebase when the Support > Device screen is opened. The Firebase dashboard displays default elements including a graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
